title: Adding user photos to SCIM synchronization with Entra ID (Azure AD)
excerpt:
Hello there, 
It would be nice for enterprise accounts to have the Azure AD profile picture sent down through SCIM and to be able (in admin settings) to block it for end-users. 
Thanks

posts.author: thomasgaillard (Thomas Gaillard)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there,

It would be nice for enterprise accounts to have the Azure AD profile picture sent down through SCIM and to be able (in admin settings) to block it for end-users.
